description: Optical switch cross-section hero art. Switch housing shown in cross-section with LED component mounted in the left wall port and phototransistor in the right wall port. Stem shown in the at-rest (not actuated) position — its machined beam-window slot is aligned to the optical axis so the terracotta dotted beam line passes freely through. A faint ghost of the stem in the actuated (pressed-down) position is drawn at reduced opacity with dashed stroke, its solid body crossing the beam axis; a warm-bronze accent dot sits at the crossing point to indicate the blocked-beam state. Spring stack rendered below the stem. No text labels; structural reading through geometry alone.

data_sources.content: article brief and thock bearings.md style guide
